title: Emissary-Ingress Mapping
description: Schema for the Emissary-Ingress Mapping custom resource definition. A Mapping connects an inbound URL prefix (and optional hostname, method, or header conditions) to a backend Kubernetes service, with support for rewrites, retries, timeouts, CORS, traffic weighting, and circuit breaking.

apiVersion.description: API version of the Mapping resource.

MappingSpec.description: Specification of the Mapping defining routing behavior, target service, and traffic policies.

prefix.description: URL path prefix that incoming requests must start with for this Mapping to apply.

service.description: Name of the Kubernetes service to forward matching requests to. Format is 'service-name' or 'service-name:port'.

hostname.description: Hostname or glob pattern that incoming requests must match in addition to the prefix. Supports wildcards such as '*.example.com'.

host.description: Deprecated. Use hostname instead. The Host header value incoming requests must present.

method.description: HTTP method that requests must use to match this Mapping.

headers.description: HTTP request headers that must be present with exact values for this Mapping to match. Key is header name, value is the required value.

regex_headers.description: HTTP request headers that must match the specified regular expression patterns. Key is header name, value is the regex pattern.

additionalProperties.description: Regular expression the header value must match.

rewrite.description: URL prefix to substitute for the matched prefix before forwarding to the upstream service. Set to empty string to strip the prefix entirely.

timeout_ms.description: Overall timeout in milliseconds for requests on this Mapping. Defaults to 3000 ms.

connect_timeout_ms.description: Timeout in milliseconds for establishing a TCP connection to the upstream service. Defaults to 3000 ms.

idle_timeout_ms.description: Timeout in milliseconds for idle upstream connections. Once a connection is idle for this duration it will be closed.

weight.description: Relative traffic weight (0-100) for distributing requests among multiple Mappings that match the same prefix. Used to implement canary and A/B deployments.

shadow.description: If true, traffic is mirrored to this Mapping's service but responses are discarded. Used for dark launch testing and traffic comparison.

tls.description: Name of a TLSContext resource to use when originating TLS connections to the upstream service.

circuit_breakers.description: Circuit breaker settings to prevent cascading failures when the upstream service is under stress.

add_request_headers.description: HTTP headers to add to all forwarded requests. Key is header name, value is the header value to set.

remove_request_headers.description: Names of HTTP request headers to remove before forwarding to the upstream service.

add_response_headers.description: HTTP headers to add to all responses returned to clients. Key is header name, value is the header value to set.

grpc.description: If true, configures routing for a gRPC upstream service, enabling HTTP/2 and gRPC-specific protocol handling.

prefix_regex.description: If true, the prefix field is treated as a regular expression rather than a literal path prefix.

bypass_auth.description: If true, bypass the external AuthService for requests matching this Mapping.

host_rewrite.description: Value to rewrite the Host header to before forwarding requests to the upstream service.

auto_host_rewrite.description: If true, automatically rewrite the Host header to the upstream service's hostname.

case_sensitive.description: If true (default), URL prefix matching is case-sensitive.

MappingStatus.description: Observed status of the Mapping as reported by Emissary-Ingress.

state.description: High-level state of the Mapping configuration.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of the current state, especially when state is Warning or Error.

conditions.description: Detailed conditions describing the Mapping's configuration state.

RetryPolicy.description: Configuration for retrying failed upstream requests for this Mapping.

retry_on.description: Condition under which to retry. Supports Envoy retry policy values including '5xx', 'connect-failure', 'retriable-4xx', 'reset', 'retriable-status-codes'.

num_retries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts before returning an error response to the client.

per_try_timeout.description: Maximum duration for each individual retry attempt as a duration string.

CORSPolicy.description: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) policy to apply to requests matching this Mapping.

origins.description: Comma-separated list of allowed origins, or '*' to allow requests from any origin.

methods.description: Comma-separated list of HTTP methods allowed in cross-origin requests.

headers.description: Comma-separated list of request headers clients are allowed to include in cross-origin requests.

credentials.description: Whether to allow credentials (cookies, HTTP authentication) in CORS requests.

exposed_headers.description: Comma-separated list of response headers that the browser is permitted to access.

max_age.description: Duration in seconds to cache CORS preflight responses.

LoadBalancer.description: Load balancing configuration for distributing requests across upstream service instances.

policy.description: Load balancing algorithm to apply when selecting upstream instances.

cookie.description: Cookie-based session affinity configuration, used with ring_hash or maglev policies.

name.description: Name of the cookie used for session affinity.

ttl.description: Time-to-live for the session affinity cookie as a duration string.

header.description: HTTP request header name used as the hash key for ring_hash or maglev consistent hashing.

source_ip.description: If true, use the client source IP address as the consistent hash key.

CircuitBreaker.description: Circuit breaker thresholds to prevent resource exhaustion and cascading failures.

priority.description: Request priority level these circuit breaker limits apply to.

max_connections.description: Maximum number of concurrent TCP connections to the upstream cluster before circuit breaking.

max_pending_requests.description: Maximum number of requests that can be queued waiting for a connection.

max_requests.description: Maximum number of parallel outstanding requests to the upstream cluster.

max_retries.description: Maximum number of parallel retry attempts to the upstream cluster.

Condition.description: A Kubernetes-style condition representing a point-in-time status observation.

lastTransitionTime.description: Timestamp when this condition last transitioned.

reason.description: Short, machine-readable reason string for the condition.

message.description: Human-readable message providing additional details about the condition.

name.description: Name of the resource, unique within the namespace.

labels.description: Labels for organizing and selecting the resource.

annotations.description: Non-identifying metadata attached to the resource.
